case_title: NICHOLS BENEDICT DBA PICTURESQUE VS COLTON PAMELA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY NICHOLS BENEDICT DBA PICTURESQUE AS TO DEFENDANT COLTON PAMELA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-13-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT COLTON PAMELA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NICHOLS BENEDICT DBA PICTURESQUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLTON PAMELA $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $38.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $538.00, NO APPEARANCE BY DEFT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT COLTON PAMELA HEARING SET FOR OCT-28-1991 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 05
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO PAMELA COLTON TO APPEAR & PRODUCE RECORDS.
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF OCT-28-1991, OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEFENDANT COLTON PAMELA
